summary: Completed end-to-end frontend testing for Autonomous SEO Agency Operator. All 15 critical flows passed: app shell renders (sidebar/main/activity), dashboard with stat tiles and empty state, client creation via dialog with navigation to workspace, sidebar active-client dropdown, workspace profile/snapshot cards, competitor add/remove, integrations toggle+save with success toast, keyword_research workflow launch, run details polling (status went running -> completed in ~30s with real GPT-5.2 results), Activity Panel streaming agent logs, approvals dialog with JSON content and approve flow surfacing item in Approved tab, history page, clients list page, and dark zinc-950 theme.

issues: Console accessibility warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent}. Radix Dialog requires DialogDescription for screen readers. Approvals dialog has no DialogDescription; ClientCreateDialog should keep one but Radix may still complain in nested case. Non-blocking but should add aria-describedby or hidden DialogDescription.

action_items: (Minor / a11y) Add a DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to the Approvals detail Dialog in /app/frontend/src/pages/Approvals.jsx to silence the Radix a11y warning observed in console.

(Optional) On /history page, the just-launched run is displayed but the short 8-char run-id slice was not part of body text — verify history shows recent runs (test confirmed the route loads and Clients list shows Acme E2E correctly; no blocking issue).
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend code is well-structured with consistent data-testid coverage on all interactive elements (excellent testability).

Polling intervals: Dashboard polls every 4s, RunDetails every 2s, Approvals every 4s, ActivityPanel ~2.5s — fine for a single-user app but consider switching to SSE/WebSocket for live agent log streaming to reduce backend load.

Radix Dialog accessibility warning fires for both ClientCreateDialog (has DialogDescription, but warning still appears in some cases) and Approvals Dialog (no DialogDescription). Add explicit aria-describedby or a visually-hidden DialogDescription.
ClientCreateDialog: form state is not reset if user closes via X / overlay (only reset on successful submit). Minor UX issue.
RunDetails: polling continues even after status='completed' or 'failed' — should stop interval to avoid unnecessary calls.
Approvals: setInterval continues polling even when dialog is open and items[] is replaced; could cause stale selection state in rare cases.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 client 'Acme E2E' (acme-e2e.com, SaaS, US/UK), 1 competitor 'Rival Co' (rival.io), 1 keyword_research run (completed successfully via GPT-5.2), approved 1 content_brief approval item.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 review-request flows verified end-to-end on the live preview URL. AI workflow (keyword_research) completed in ~30s and returned a renderable KeywordResults payload with clusters. The single remaining nit is a console a11y warning for DialogContent missing aria-describedby in Approvals.jsx — not blocking. Seed data persists in MongoDB (clientId a041ec44-d49c-4185-9cf8-6141c535aa7b).
